Objects.Notes: A spring that bounces the player into the air when jumping on it.

Obj_arg0.Name: Launch Force
Obj_arg0.Description: The force to launch the player with. Default is 30.

Obj_arg1.Name: Ground Pound Launch Force
Obj_arg1.Description: The force to launch the player with when ground pounding. Default is Obj_arg0 + 5.

Obj_arg2.Name: Color Frame
Obj_arg2.Description: The color frame to be used. Default is 7.

Obj_arg3.Name: Movement Speed
Obj_arg3.Description: Sets the rate at which it moves on the path. Default is 10.

Obj_arg4.Name: Stop When Bouncing?
Obj_arg4.Description: If set while the trampoline is on a path, the object will stop when the player bounces on it, and begin moving again afterwards.

Rail.Description: The optional path that it can move on.

SW_A.Description: If used, the trampoline will not be usable while this switch is activated.

SW_B.Description: Gets activated after the player bounces on it.
